summary: Iteration 14: Frontend-only testing of UI redesign changes - TopNav simplification, product detail dark hero, red accent theme, category tab navigation, and admin settings colors. All 12 test scenarios passed.

design_issues.screen: Product detail page (Zoho One Express Setup)
issues: Outcome strip shows only 1 card with title 'OUTCOME' and body '11' — stale test data from previous iterations. The product's `outcome` field in MongoDB has been overwritten with '11'. Code is correct; this is a data issue.
What's Included section card is empty (no bullets) — same product has no inclusions in DB. Stale test data. Code handles empty arrays gracefully.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up stale test data on 'Zoho One Express Setup' product — reset `outcome` field back to a real description, re-add inclusion bullets. This is a data-only fix in Admin > Catalog.
critical_code_review_comments: TopNav: Main nav bar now only has Store + Admin links. Portal and My Profile only in dropdown ✅
ProductHero: Dark navy (#0f172a) hero with red accent dash, category label, product title and description. No tag pills ✅
CategoryTabs: Active tab uses bg-red-600 (red) instead of dark navy ✅
SectionCard: Red left-border accent (h-5 w-1 bg-red-500 rounded-full) on all section headers ✅
OfferingCard: White card with red 'View details' link (text-red-600) ✅
Store: Hero banner uses bg-[#0f172a] (dark navy) with red accent line ✅
Admin Settings: Brand Colors panel shows Primary #0f172a (navy) and Accent #dc2626 (red) ✅
categoryFromSlug in lib/categories.ts: Fixed space-to-hyphen conversion correctly handles all category slugs ✅
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 redesign tests verified: (1) TopNav has only Store + Admin in main bar, Portal/My Profile only in dropdown; (2) ProductHero is dark navy with red accent dash, category label, no tag pills; (3) CTA button is red; (4) SectionCard has red left border accent; (5) CategoryTabs active tab is red (bg-red-600); (6) Category navigation works (click Migrate to Zoho → URL changes to ?category=migrations, shows 8 products); (7) Build & Automate tab works; (8) OfferingCard has white card with red 'View details' link; (9) Store hero is dark navy; (10) Admin Settings shows Primary #0f172a + Accent #dc2626; (11) index.css --aa-accent is #dc2626. Minor data issue: 'Zoho One Express Setup' product has stale test data (outcome='11', no inclusions). This is a DB data issue only.

verified_features.topnav_simplified: Store + Admin only in main nav bar, Portal/My Profile only in dropdown
verified_features.product_hero_redesign: Dark navy (#0f172a) hero, red accent dash, category label, title, description — NO tag pills
verified_features.category_tab_navigation: All tested tabs navigate correctly (migrations, build-automate)
verified_features.offering_card_redesign: White card with red 'View details' link text-red-600
verified_features.store_dark_hero: Store hero uses bg-[#0f172a] (dark navy) with red accents
verified_features.admin_settings_colors: Primary #0f172a + Accent #dc2626 visible in Brand Colors panel
